nasb.text: Already he who reaps is receiving wages and is gathering fruit for life eternal; so that he who sows and he who reaps may rejoice together.

esv.text: Already the one who reaps is receiving wages and gathering fruit for eternal life, so that sower and reaper may rejoice together.

cnv.text: 收割的人得到工資，也積儲五穀直到永生，使撒種的和收割的一同快樂。

ccb.text: 收割的人不但可以得到报酬，而且可以为永生收获果实，叫撒种的和收割的一同快乐。

csbs.text: 收割的人得酬报，收集果实归入永恒的生命，好使撒种的和收割的一同快乐。
